author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(docs): change jade to pug (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#615)
body:
fixes algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#613

Basically the changes are as follows

1. rename *.jade to *.pug
2. rename all occurences of *.jade to *.pug
3. add pug as a devDep and remove jade
4. change the "engine" in the metalsmith to pug
5. look at diffs
6. enjoy
